---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 为此项目提出一个想法
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description / 描述

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.
请清晰简洁地描述你想要的功能。

## Use Case / 使用场景

Describe the use case: what problem does this feature solve? How would you use it?
请描述使用场景：这个功能解决什么问题？你会如何使用它？

## Proposed Solution / 提议的解决方案

A clear description of how you'd like this feature to work.
请清晰描述你希望这个功能如何运作。

Include any mockups, wireframes, or code examples if applicable.
如果可以，请包含任何模型、线框图或代码示例。

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑过的替代方案

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
请描述你考虑过的任何替代解决方案或功能。

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Add any other context, screenshots, or references to similar features in other projects.
请添加其他上下文、截图或类似功能在其他项目中的参考。
